name: Nanao Yozakura
description: __Affiliation:__ Yozakura Family __Occupation:__ Student, Spy ~!__Blooming:__ Adaptation!~ Nanao is one of the main supporting characters and younger son in the Yozakura Family. He is the sweet and gentle (but enormous) youngest brother, adept at creating drugs and medicine of all kinds. Hides his face with a bucket. ~! It is later revealed that he uses medicine to shrink his body so he can look like a normal student and go to school to try and live a normal life. !~

name: Naomi Armitage
description: Naomi is an illegal 'third type' android who was created by Dr. Asakura whom she calls father. When Ross Syllabus joins the Mars Police Department he become Naomi's new partner. The 'third type' androids are one of the most human like androids with special abilities that other androids do not have. They have been living with humans and no one can tell the difference between humans and them.

name: Neruru
description: A slave woman raised among the bandit clan known as "The Crow." ~!She nearly loses her life at the hands of a troll kept by [Broco](https://anilist.co/character/366645/Broco), but is subsequently revived by [Clen](https://anilist.co/character/339319/Clen). She becomes [Luna's](https://anilist.co/character/355949/Luna) wet nurse and accompanies him on the journey.!~
